Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 24}While in battle, press {f 1 3 104} to open the Tactics menu and select {f 0 1 2}Escape{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The battle will end if an escape route can be found after three turns. However, keep in mind that an escape route may not be found.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}While in the process of looking for an escape route, commands can still be given to other party members.[n]{f 1 1}
